description: Clinker calcination process emission factors (Scope 1, Cement Plant only) and purchased clinker upstream factors (Scope 3, Grinding Plant).

factors.notes: Default clinker-based process emission factor. Plant-specific range 490-540 kgCO2/tonne clinker.
Computed: (CaO% * 0.785 + MgO% * 1.092) / 100 * (44/56). Use when lab-certified CaO content is available.
Upstream emissions of purchased clinker. Override with supplier-certified EPD factor if available.
